in the 2nd (right) digit = Generic 
COMMENT: 
This field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost Shares do not apply. The 
catastrophic coverage phase is also referred to as the post-out-of-pocket threshold phase for the Part 
D benefit. 
The CCW team constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care 
for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from
